steps.title: Identify the task requirement
steps.content: The student must make and support a generalization about the effect of redesigning—this means the answer needs both a broad claim about what redesigning accomplishes and evidence to back it up.

steps.title: Identify the match
steps.content: D opens with a generalization about what redesigning can achieve—Redesigning a poorly designed city flag can create a meaningful symbol of civic pride, as was the case when Pocatello redesigned its original flag to better represent its geography and civic priorities. is correct.
